name: Ceasar Salad (Original)
recipeInstructions:
1. Break romaine lettuce into 2-inch strips, discarding outer leaves.
2. Pour garlic-flavored oil over the lettuce.
3. Sprinkle pepper and salt over the lettuce. Toss several times.
4. Add coddled eggs, Worcestershire sauce, and lemon juice. Toss several times again.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
6. Add croutons and toss one more time.
7. Serve immediately.
